title: kadua axillaris
intro: Kadua axillaris, also known as the Hawaiian lilac or ma'o hau hele, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii. It has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kadua axillaris include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Kadua axillaris can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
